title: Spatial Layout — Greybox Slice
description: Room generation: pattern selection, slot→asset assignment, non-clipping placement from greybox primitives. LLM emits semantic intent only; deterministic engine resolves transforms.

prompts.prompt: Build a medium kitchen with a stove, a fridge, and a counter along the north wall. Put a table in the center.
Build an L-shaped kitchen. Put a stove and counter in the main cooking wing, and a table with two chairs in the dining wing.
Build a long corridor, 10 metres. Place shelves along both walls.
Build a kitchen and place the stove immediately to the right of the fridge using an ARCS override.
